final_prompt.prompt:
Create a photorealistic product shot of a 字节跳动 employee ID badge, showing both the front and back sides.

Style/medium: photorealistic studio product photography, sharp focus, no illustration or render feel
Composition: two badge cards laid side by side at a slight angle — front face on the left, back face on the right — centered on a neutral background, shot from a slightly elevated three-quarter angle, 85mm macro lens equivalent
Subject: corporate employee ID badge for 字节跳动; front side features the 字节跳动 logo, employee photo placeholder, employee name, job title, and department text; back side features a magnetic stripe or barcode/QR code area, company address or policy text, and a lanyard hole at the top; badge is credit-card sized with rounded corners, made of rigid PVC
Scene/backdrop: clean light-gray or off-white studio surface, subtle soft shadow beneath each card
Lighting/mood: soft diffused overhead studio light with a gentle fill from the left, neutral and clean, no harsh reflections, corporate and trustworthy feel
Color palette: badge base is white with 字节跳动 brand black and red accent; surface is neutral gray to keep focus on the badge
Materials/textures: glossy PVC card surface with subtle specular highlight, printed ink texture visible on text and logo areas, slight edge thickness visible
Text (verbatim): "字节跳动"
Constraints: both sides must be fully legible and simultaneously visible in one frame; badge proportions must match standard CR80 card (85.6 × 54 mm); lanyard slot visible at top
Avoid: cartoon or flat illustration style, floating badge with no surface, blurry text, distorted logo, generic placeholder badge design, watermark
